channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【Browser Run: give your agents a browser】浏览器运行：为您的代理提供浏览器
item.description: 【 Browser Rendering is now Browser Run, with Live View, Human in the Loop, CDP access, session recordings, and 4x higher concurrency limits for AI agents. 】浏览器渲染现在是浏览器运行，具有实时视图、人在循环、CDP 访问、会话记录以及 AI 代理的 4 倍高并发限制。

item.title: 【Register domains wherever you build: Cloudflare Registrar API now in beta】无论您在何处构建，都可以注册域名：Cloudflare Registrar API 现已推出测试版
item.description: 【 The Cloudflare Registrar API is now in beta. Developers and AI agents can search, check availability, and register domains at cost directly from their editor, their terminal, or their agent — without leaving their workflow. 】Cloudflare Registrar API 现已处于测试阶段。开发人员和人工智能代理可以直接从编辑器、终端或代理搜索、检查可用性和注册域名，而无需离开他们的工作流程。

item.title: 【Rearchitecting the Workflows control plane for the agentic era】为代理时代重新构建工作流控制平面
item.description: 【 Cloudflare Workflows, a durable execution engine for multi-step applications, now supports higher concurrency and creation rate limits through a rearchitectured control plane, helping scale to meet the use cases for durable background agents. 】Cloudflare Workflows 是用于多步骤应用程序的持久执行引擎，现在通过重新架构的控制平面支持更高的并发性和创建速率限制，有助于扩展以满足持久后台代理的用例。

item.title: 【Introducing Agent Lee - a new interface to the Cloudflare stack】Agent Lee 简介 - Cloudflare 堆栈的新界面
item.description: 【 Agent Lee is an in-dashboard agent that shifts Cloudflare’s interface from manual tab-switching to a single prompt. Using sandboxed TypeScript, it helps you troubleshoot and manage your stack as a grounded technical collaborator. 】Agent Lee 是一个仪表板内代理，它将 Cloudflare 的界面从手动选项卡切换转变为单个提示。使用沙盒 TypeScript，它可以帮助您作为扎根的技术协作者排除故障并管理堆栈。

item.title: 【Project Think: building the next generation of AI agents on Cloudflare】Project Think：在 Cloudflare 上构建下一代 AI 代理
item.description: 【 Announcing a preview of the next edition of the Agents SDK — from lightweight primitives to a batteries-included platform for AI agents that think, act, and persist. 】宣布推出下一版 Agents SDK 预览版——从轻量级原语到包含电池的 AI 代理平台，能够思考、行动和坚持。

item.title: 【Add voice to your agent】为您的代理添加声音
item.description: 【 An experimental voice pipeline for the Agents SDK enables real-time voice interactions over WebSockets. Developers can now build agents with continuous STT and TTS in just ~30 lines of server-side code. 】Agents SDK 的实验性语音管道支持通过 WebSocket 进行实时语音交互。开发人员现在只需大约 30 行服务器端代码即可构建具有连续 STT 和 TTS 的代理。

item.title: 【Managed OAuth for Access: make internal apps agent-ready in one click】用于访问的托管 OAuth：一键使内部应用程序代理就绪
item.description: 【 Managed OAuth for Cloudflare Access helps AI agents securely navigate internal applications. By adopting RFC 9728, agents can authenticate on behalf of users without using insecure service accounts. 】Cloudflare Access 的托管 OAuth 可帮助 AI 代理安全地导航内部应用程序。通过采用 RFC 9728，代理可以代表用户进行身份验证，而无需使用不安全的服务帐户。

item.title: 【Securing non-human identities: automated revocation, OAuth, and scoped permissions】保护非人类身份：自动撤销、OAuth 和范围权限
item.description: 【 Cloudflare is introducing scannable API tokens, enhanced OAuth visibility, and GA for resource-scoped permissions. These tools help developers implement a true least-privilege architecture while protecting against credential leakage. 】Cloudflare 引入了可扫描的 API 令牌、增强的 OAuth 可见性以及资源范围权限的 GA。这些工具可帮助开发人员实现真正的最低权限架构，同时防止凭证泄漏。

item.title: 【Scaling MCP adoption: Our reference architecture for simpler, safer and cheaper enterprise deployments of MCP】扩大 MCP 的采用：我们的参考架构可实现更简单、更安全和更便宜的 MCP 企业部署
item.description: 【 We share Cloudflare's internal strategy for governing MCP using Access, AI Gateway, and MCP server portals. We also launch Code Mode to slash token costs and recommend new rules for detecting Shadow MCP in Cloudflare Gateway. 】我们分享 Cloudflare 使用 Access、AI 网关和 MCP 服务器门户管理 MCP 的内部策略。我们还推出了代码模式来削减代币成本，并推荐了在 Cloudflare Gateway 中检测 Shadow MCP 的新规则。

item.title: 【Secure private networking for everyone: users, nodes, agents, Workers — introducing Cloudflare Mesh】为每个人提供安全的私有网络：用户、节点、代理、工作人员 — 引入 Cloudflare Mesh
item.description: 【 Cloudflare Mesh provides secure, private network access for users, nodes, and autonomous AI agents. By integrating with Workers VPC, developers can now grant agents scoped access to private databases and APIs without manual tunnels. 】Cloudflare Mesh 为用户、节点和自主 AI 代理提供安全的专用网络访问。通过与 Workers VPC 集成，开发人员现在可以授予代理对私有数据库和 API 的范围内访问权限，而无需手动隧道。
